SlidePlan.description: Step 5a output. Maps each content-outline slot to a template layout + generation strategy. Step 7 dispatches one subagent per slide.

outline.description: One-line summary of the deck topic and audience, copied/abridged from content-outline.json.

taskId.description: Stable per-slide identifier, e.g. s01, s02. Used as the join key into slide-content.json.

layoutRef.description: Filename of the template's slideLayout to use. Must exist in $PROFILE → layouts.

cloneSource.description: Sample slide filename when strategy is clone-sample/augmented-clone (e.g. 'slide4.xml'); null otherwise.

styleRef.description: Optional pointer to a slide-design-slide{N}.json analysis used by spec-composed strategy.

contentBrief.description: Short prose describing what the slide should communicate. Step 6 expands into slot text.

Strategy.description: Pick the lightest that works. clone-sample > clone-layout > augmented-clone > spec-composed.
